title: salix angustior
intro: Salix angustior, also known as the willow herb, is a plant species in the willow family (Salicaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are attributed to its high salicylic acid content. The health benefits of Salix angustior include reducing pain and fever, as well as alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Salix angustior can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
